name: HubSpot → ERPNext (Issue Order v2 — single endpoint)

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, sales_order: $json.message?.sales_order, validation_status: $json.message?.validation_status, hubspot_complete: $json.message?.hubspot_complete, ready_to_reserve: $json.message?.ready_to_reserve, created: $json.message?.created }) }}
